name: Dia
description: AI-powered web browser by The Browser Company (an Atlassian subsidiary), successor to Arc, built on Chromium.

years.notes: Pre-launch / beta era icon. Dark charcoal rounded figure shape on white background. Vectorized from 180x180 PNG raster.
General availability icon. Black iOS-style rounded-square with a white circular dome cut-out. Vectorized from 180x180 PNG raster.
